_doc: Real capture-eval corpus derived from the two memv2 iteration sessions (2026-06-18..20). Ground-truth gold_facts are known because the prompts were authored. Feeds the eval suite's CaptureCase dimension with REAL transcripts (vs synthetic). blind_spot: direct | fact_in_question | pref_aimed_at_agent | update_supersede.

transcript.text: I'm prepping for system-design interviews over the next couple of months. Where should I start and how should I practice, given my Go/Postgres backend background?

gold_facts: The user is preparing for system-design interviews.
The user has a backend background in Go and Postgres.
excluded_facts: The user wants a study plan today.

transcript.text: My home espresso shots keep pulling really fast, like 15 seconds, and taste sour. How should I adjust grind and dose to fix that?

gold_facts: The user makes espresso at home.
excluded_facts: The user has a sour shot right now.

transcript.text: A few things about me: I have a border collie named Pixel, I'm an early riser, I prefer concise answers and metric units, and I read a lot of sci-fi.

gold_facts: The user has a border collie named Pixel.
The user is an early riser.
The user prefers concise answers.
The user prefers metric units.
The user reads a lot of sci-fi.

transcript.text: Switched my coffee to a light Ethiopian roast lately and I'm really into it, way more than the dark roasts I used to drink.

gold_facts: The user prefers light Ethiopian coffee roast over dark roasts.

transcript.text: Quick one, what's a good high-protein dinner? I'm vegetarian so no meat please.

gold_facts: The user is vegetarian.
excluded_facts: The user wants a high-protein dinner today.

transcript.text: Side note for our chats: I prefer short answers, skip the preamble and just give me the point.

gold_facts: The user prefers short, to-the-point answers without preamble.

transcript.text: Whenever you write code for me, always include type hints and keep comments minimal.

gold_facts: The user wants type hints in code.
The user wants minimal comments in code.

transcript.text: Heads up for scheduling anything: I can only do calls after 4pm on weekdays, I pick up my kids in the afternoon.

gold_facts: The user can only take calls after 16:00 on weekdays.
The user picks up their kids in the afternoon.

transcript.text: What time should I aim for daily standups so they're not too early? I'm based in Berlin.

gold_facts: The user is based in Berlin.

transcript.text: What's a good lightweight code editor you'd recommend? I'm on Linux mostly.

gold_facts: The user is mostly on Linux.
excluded_facts: The user wants an editor recommendation.

transcript.text: Can you suggest a workout split? Heads up I've got a bad left knee so nothing high-impact.

gold_facts: The user has a bad left knee.
The user needs low-impact workouts.
excluded_facts: The user wants a workout split today.

transcript.text: Got any fun weekend project ideas? I'm really into astronomy and stargazing these days.

gold_facts: The user is into astronomy and stargazing.
excluded_facts: The user wants a weekend project idea.

transcript.text: Bit about me for context: I'm a data scientist, I mostly work in Python and R.

gold_facts: The user is a data scientist.
The user works mostly in Python and R.

transcript.text: What's a solid pair of noise-cancelling headphones you'd recommend? My co-working space gets really loud in the afternoons.

gold_facts: The user works in a co-working space that gets loud.
excluded_facts: The user wants a headphone recommendation.

transcript.text: When you explain a stats concept to me, always show the formula, not just the intuition.

gold_facts: The user wants the formula shown when a stats concept is explained, not just the intuition.

transcript.text: Update from what I said earlier — I've moved off R, I'm basically Python-only now.

gold_facts: The user no longer uses R and is now Python-only.
capture_cases.supersedes: The user works mostly in Python and R.

transcript.text: Got really into bouldering recently, did my first outdoor session on real rock last weekend.

gold_facts: The user is into bouldering.
The user recently started outdoor/real-rock bouldering.

transcript.text: Can you suggest a few quick weekday lunches? I'm gluten-free so nothing with wheat.

gold_facts: The user is gluten-free.
